Advisory

Planologic Contributes to the Preparation of I-PRO Documents for Madiun Regency

Turning regional development opportunities into investment-ready projects — supporting Madiun Regency's Pre-Feasibility Study and Investment Project Ready to Offer documents.

Madiun – Unlocking regional investment potential requires more than identifying promising projects—it demands comprehensive planning supported by robust technical and economic analysis. As part of this effort, Planologic is contributing to the preparation of the Pre-Feasibility Study (Pre-FS) and Investment Project Ready to Offer (I-PRO) documents for strategic regional assets in Madiun Regency.

The initiative aims to transform regional development opportunities into investment-ready projects that can attract both public and private investors while strengthening local economic growth and increasing regional revenue. The final outputs include comprehensive Pre-FS documents, executive project summaries, and investment promotion materials designed to support investor engagement.

Technical studies and spatial analysis

Throughout the preparation process, Planologic contributes to technical studies and spatial analyses that assess project viability from multiple perspectives. The work encompasses location analysis, accessibility, infrastructure availability, land suitability, and consistency with regional spatial planning policies. These analyses ensure that proposed investment projects are not only financially attractive but also aligned with sustainable regional development objectives.

A collaborative process

The preparation process follows a collaborative approach involving data collection, stakeholder consultations, focus group discussions, field surveys, site verification, and benchmarking with comparable projects in other regions. This methodology enables the planning team to integrate technical evidence, local knowledge, and stakeholder perspectives into a comprehensive investment strategy.

“Beyond technical assessments, the study also evaluates market potential, business opportunities, financing schemes, and implementation strategies to produce investment proposals that are practical and attractive to prospective investors.”

Strengthening investment readiness

Planologic's involvement reflects its commitment to supporting evidence-based regional planning and investment promotion. Through interdisciplinary planning and collaboration with government stakeholders, the organization seeks to help local governments translate development potential into implementable projects that generate long-term economic benefits while remaining consistent with regional planning frameworks.

Ultimately, the preparation of the I-PRO and Pre-FS documents is expected to strengthen Madiun Regency's investment readiness by providing credible project documentation, improving investor confidence, and supporting sustainable regional economic development.
